title: dendrobium kingianum subsp. carnarvonense
intro: Dendrobium kingianum subsp. carnarvonense, also known as the Carnarvon Philodendron or Carnarvon Dendrobium, is a rare and endemic species of orchid native to the Carnarvon Range in Queensland, Australia. The plant is valued for its traditional medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Studies have shown that the plant may have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and benefits.
